reviews.review_description: Can't get past the birds, blowing worked earlier in the game but doesn't work anymore. Mic permissions are on, casting is off. Mic has been tested, but won't register at this point in the game.....Can't continue. Glad I didn't pay full price!
A cute, fun, and emotionally immersive game with beautiful graphics. The puzzles aren’t obvious, and you really have to figure things out. I just wish it were longer.
Make more stories like that please - so fun

reviews.review_title: Ruined this game with ridiculous blowing
reviews.review_description: Who’s the idiot that decided that loudly blowing into your microphone (which still doesn’t work) was somehow interesting or fun? Seriously no one and I mean no one finds it a great time to sit there loudly blowing into to the microphone! Especially considering it rarely works and you get stuck part way through a game because the microphone is designed to filter out that kind of noise and refuses to recognize it. Now I’ve wasted more money on a garbage game I can’t play due to a stupid interaction you can’t bypass or escape. Why would anyone want to blow into the mic anyways? Talk about stupidity. On top of all that the controls and interactions are terrible. Good luck throwing accurately and picking things up is irritating. Very poorly done.
I don't know what took me so long to play this game..its beautiful, magical & the puzzles are fun & ..its just beautiful

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I’ve played honest
reviews.review_description:
This game features a very immersive gameplay and the background music was so incredibly heart touching. The colors around the town are super vibrant and amazing. 🤩 I love how you are able to experience the emotions of the little cat character and pick him up to his feet when he’s sad or overwhelmed of something. You’re like a big guardian angel and you experience such wonderful moments with him and the whole story is just amazing bro. 

I wish they would create another one like this.
I wasn't expecting a sad story for a game. It was fun to play and figure out the puzzles.

reviews.review_title: Like a play in theatre and very musical
reviews.review_description: Yes, it is a short game. It is also very unique and a bit challenging at times if you don't see what is right in front of you to solve the problem! 😂 I tried to make it rain and it took me so long to figure it out. Talking to L is definitely a way to get hints till he completely falls asleep on you in one stage 😆. Go into the game and expect a good story but not a long game and you will feel happy like everyone else who loves it!

More of an interactive story than a game as such.

It is a beautiful universe and a sweet and emotional story. I really liked the environments and the characters.

If you like games like Down the rabbithole and The Fischerman's tale, I think you also will like this.

I enjoyed playing this, and I would buy a sequel, if it came out.
I cant cuz the menu button and the three lines are swiched so the three lines open the vr menu and the menu button does what the three lines do
This game has a surprisingly emotional story that is mixed with a puzzle game. But it is not worth $20 for it.

Played on a quest 3

Audio doesn't seem positional.  Feels weird to hear the main character  meant it be  behind a rock but it feels like he's 45 degrees right lost somewhere in the trees. 

Hand tracking/poses don't match buttons like you might expect, (no buttons pressed showing pointing rather than an open hand.) seemed like a bug.

Gameplay is heavily scripted, having to interact with things in the right sequence, even when pulling the same type of dead flowers out of the ground. 

Sometimes objects are positioned poorly, inside your body etc, makes it hard to play sitting down. 

Script/dialogue feels a bit amateur, though I haven't played the entire game.

Baffling the folks who don’t like it. Were they expecting something else?

I loved my time in this cute diorama.
I loved the game, this sweet puzzle was fun
Can not interact well with the objects. Fails to grab most of the time. For some reason I dont know, I' m not allowed to refund.

I loved this game since i first booted it up, beautiful aesthetic, charming characters, great musical score, the only aspect where it lacks is the story that is a bit cliche, but it is still good.

Love you Loui.
A beautiful emotional ride. Incredible characters and animation. Didnt want it to end. Hope for something similar in future would give it 10 if i could. I have no glitches perfect on quest 3
The game is very, very fun and the lil kid is very cute and funny I think they should add another game with the kid is an adult and he remembers the ghost.
￼ It’s sad, but it’s also so cute because you’re a ghost  helping little child you also are technically to dead friend and that’s all I have to say it’s a really good game though

Purchased game it downloaded but want
 load.
What a beautiful, casual, amazing game... I was truly transported in the game design and artwork...  Great and fascinating storyline...
Just bought but it doesn't work. Says return to play area even though I'm in the play area

This is a lovely lovely little game, and I enjoyed playing through. The puzzles are sweet, and once you get about half through the game, they become more complex and fun in a way I love from typical puzzle games. Some early puzzles are just guiding Louis through different scenes, and you interact but don't game as such. This would be a 5 star playthrough, especially on sale at $4, except for the controls. Read some of the reviews that have tips of the unintuitive finger grab, that helped. Also some of gameplay is a little glitchy (the paintbrush colour scene, the egg scene near the end) - I looked up a playthrough to see what I was doing wrong and the answer was nothing. Just the different puzzle elements glitching 🤷 don't expect a long game , but it's very moving.
I didn't play for too long before abandoning the game. It's cheesy and seems to be made for kids. The voice acting is poorly done. And the controls are some of the worst I've seen. It's just clunky.

Wonderful story with interesting gameplay.

I finished the game in one evening. Maybe a 2hours + of gameplay.

Yes, it does have a couple of janky controls here and there, but the overall quality of the game makes up for it.

Art direction and music are both superb!
Hopefully the devs could release a remaster for the q3 platform.
Very childish story with the worst gameplay. Really a waste of money.....
I am diagnosed with depression and this game actually put a tear in my eye, this game is so heart warming. if you have depression I recommend playing this game.

Nice game with one bug: the audio. Voices and other sounds almost all come from the wrong direction. This isn't optimal for the gaming experience. BTW, I put my headphones on correctly, and this bug only affects Ghost Giant. 
For 25 euros I don't expect such bugs

reviews.review_title: Here are tips for better experience
reviews.review_description:
It's a well-made narrative game and would have received a 4.8-star rating if not for bad reviews about unintuitive object grabbing and menu entry.

So, here are some tips on how not to get upset:

- Tutorial Pause / Menu blocker: simply hold the menu button for 5-10 seconds to enter the main menu. You'll notice the game fades the longer you press the button.

- Grabbing/picking control: make the tip of your game finger touch an item and press grip (or trigger). That's it! This is unintuitive because you typically grasp an object with your palm rather than your fingertip.

- There is a buggy part when you need to grab eggs: keep trying to pick a side of an egg, not touching the egg itself. After a few dozen tries, you eventually grab the egg.

reviews.review_title: I want to like this game but..
reviews.review_description:
The microphone just will not register 
I know my microphone itself still works just not in the game

reviews.review_title: One of my favourite pieces of art.
reviews.review_description:
It doesn't offer much in gameplay, but this game makes effective use of VR to tell such an emotional story about relative depression that I really couldn't care less. You're not the main character in this game, you're pretty much just following this little boy (who you immediately want to best for), meeting colourful characters around this aestheticly charming, puppet-core world and helping him pull his life together. I'm leaving it at that because this game is best experienced blind.

Now, in regards to this version of the game, I would give the Quest port 2 and a half stars. At best, the printed background syndrome isn't always as noticeable. At worst, the audio is kind of broken, with characters speaking independently from where the audio is being emitted from and the dialogue being inconsistently too loud or quiet at times. While the experience on the Quest is tolerable, I still prefer it on the PSVR. I apologise if that is not a fair comparison. It's just where I stand as someone who played it back in 2019, and considering the fact that there is no PCVR version available (at least according to my findings and searches), I think that scrutiny is justified.

Storytelling, soundtracks, visuals everything was perfect. However, grabbing and throwing things was a problem. Throwing basketball to right place is out of question. It always goes randomly. The cemetery level was a torture. Devs, you should fix grabbing and throwing mechanics. Make the grab volume larger and disable physics until it gets thrown. It really breaks the game

I was looking for games that my 10 year old daughter would like. Found this one recommended on a blog and it did not disappoint. 

My daughter played it through and absolutely loved it. The ending had her in tears and she was so happy that I downloaded it for her.

As a father I love seeing my family happy so seeing the joy it brought her made me play it. I absolutely loved it too. They need to make a part two. We need to see Louie and The Giant together again!
I adore diorama puzzle games and this one is top tier. Devs, if you see this review: PLEASE MAKE MORE!!!
My daughter absolutely loves this game and can’t put it down. I admit watching her play on stream to our tv in living from, it is very well done and creative. Super fun times. Great job!
This game is perfect and there needs to be a part two where Louis is adult now for an idea so please make a part two of this game ￼￼￼￼
This should not be in the store the game mechanics are so terrible.
This game doesn't set up with oculus 3  i don't advice to buy the game

I love these animated short films that allow you to interact. This was the most interactive short film I've experienced and it was beautifully done. 

Controls were a little challenging at times, but this didn't take away from the experience. Loved this!! Please keep making more!! 🔥🔥❤️❤️😁✌️

reviews.review_title: Great game and a great story
reviews.review_description: This game is all about environment manipulation to assist the kiddo along his path. The situations are like little puzzles. They're not super difficult but some will have you stopping to think how you can do something. The story is very good as well and I found myself very invested in it. Great game for anyone looking for a story/puzzle game they can just play leisurely while sitting down. Highly recommend this one! I've play several meta games so far and this is the first that I felt compelled to write a review for if that tells you anything.
如题
You can't pause to play it.  Refund!!!! No thanks. I've restarted my VR and installing. I even changed my boundary.

One of my favorite games (and I have bought MANY)!!!  There are many moments in the game that are so cute, heartwarming and emotional, and the scenery is beautiful. I love the theme/objective of the game. The puzzles are not hard but not too easy, so it is never boring. The only issue is that gripping items can be a little finicky. Length of game is short/medium, you can finish it in some hours.

Don't miss out on the story experience due to start bug (fix included). I'm glad that I persisted in fixing problem to experience the story. The visual story telling and interaction was great. I wish I could experience it again the first time. 

Please note that the story can take between 40min - 2 hours depending on how fast you go and explore.  (even better if on sales). 

Fix:
Stuck on "return to play area" once started. 
One of the three things could help. (try In order) 

1 Click on the three dash line on controller to select (unpauses the game) which moves you forward and unstuck.

 (the game starts by moving you to the tutorial area you might be under the graphics and by default it says return to the play area out of bound hence I'm suspecting the game might have been paused. And this should do the trick. 

2 Or if that doesn't work. Hold down the three dash line on controller that should get you back to main menu (might take 5-10 seconds).

3 Lastly if that doesn't work. Restart the meta quest 3 device or redraw the boundaries.

This is by far one of the best games I have ever played. If you are the person who is looking to be taken on a journey through a story where you are taken into a new world. A world where you are involved in a life a little boy, that is in need of a big friend that will help him along the way through bumpy roads.
If this sounds like something you would enjoy then I highly recommend you get this game.

The game is really boring, with many long dialogues and terrible user experience. It is not clear what objects are possible to grab, so you just have to try touching everything until you find something is interactable. It is so so boring. My least favorite purchase so far on the quest.

This is an OK game. I'm coming from just finishing Moss 1&2 which are hard to top so my review may be tough. The game was cute enough but kind of boring at times. Too much to watch before being able to play. The controls also need work. A lot of thinhs were difficult to grab, and at one point the crank on the back of the piano glitched and detached from the piano and went half way across the screen. I couldn't get it to reattach and had to restart the whole level. The game was also surprisingly short, I finished it in one sitting. Story line was a bit dark, but interesting to have something different. Overall I'm glad I got the game on sale because I feel like I'd be more disappointed if I had paid full price for it.

Same as many of the reviews here, there is a bug in the start up menu. Have not been able to play at all. So annoying just wasted 30mins of my life retracing steps to see if I could figure out what I did wrong. Not worth it, requesting a refund.

Ghost giants was such a well made game that it makes you (well at least me) get really attached to the character Louie. The ending is so heart worming, and I feel that anyone at any game would enjoy it!! So I would definitely recommend buying this game!!!!🐱😄

I had bought this game a month ago. I have finally got to playing it. This game is very meaningful. I have depression and I could connect really well with the characters. I could understand everything the character was going through, and in the scene where you become small in the grass I got emotional because she was screaming and crying for them not to take her away which is really just sad. And it's the fact that you were her happy. I probably wouldn't suggest people to play this if they don't understand depression because they might be a little confused! But honestly this game is so well done!

reviews.review_title: Tthis ghost giant I couldn't setup it
reviews.review_description:
I think this game had something wrong
it is very bad
Terrible game..

This game gets full marks on every level. Story, voice acting, graphics, music and gameplay all worked together elegantly to make this game an unforgettable experience. I'm emotional at default, but this game still hit me harder than I have been in a long time. My quest is still wet with tears. To anyone who enjoys puzzle games and story-driven games, do yourself a favor and do not pass up on this one.
Great story, got a tear  in my eye

reviews.review_title: So disappointed! More for kids and girls
reviews.review_description:
For the price I paid, it is definitely not worth it! The game has too many conversations which is so draggy and it is taking forever to load from chapter to chapter. Hence, it is trying to drag the duration of the game in which the actual interaction or puzzle solving is darn too easy and direct. More suitable for kids.

I agree that the visuals and storyline are beautiful but it is just not exciting.
Dont expect it to be like Moss, as it is more challenging in Moss. 
I feel like being scammed cos most of the puzzle solving games are really too short. Within 5 hrs or less I can finished the entire game. And once you are done, there are no more surprises for you to replay the game. And I am not the type who like to replay the game since I already knew the trick.
 
Should you set the price lower at 15USD, maybe it is still fine. 

so dissappointed!

reviews.review_title: Great game, not worth the price.
reviews.review_description: This game is extremely well-made. A truly beautiful VR experience. A lovely story. But it's pretty short, with little-to-no replay value. Not really worth $30

Loved it. It was so beautiful and my heart was so attached. I also really appreciated the puzzle aspect of the game. It wasn’t too hard and the main character would give you hints. It only has 4 stars because it was too short. Please add more. I did the entire game start to finish in under 4 hours and I’m very new to oculus. The other problem I had was the amount of time I spend trying to get the basketball in the hoop. When it’s too far of shot it’s not easy to aim at. I’m not sure if it was worth the money, but I did enjoy it immensely.  Hoping for an update that adds more.

reviews.review_title: Something is wrong with eye distance
reviews.review_description:
I don't know if it's just me, but this game causes me major eye strain and it's downright unplayable on my quest 2.
The game feels out of focus, and I can tell it because i can't focus on the game and the guardian limits at the same time.
If I open one eye at a time, I see everything looks much further away from left to right than it should. I don't know if this is the real problem: the only thing I know is that it doesn't feel right.
I didn't have this problem with any other game.
If this problem can't be solved I'll have to ask for a refund, I really can't run this game without my eyes starting to hurt real bad.
Just started playing the game. I’ve made it to the Harbor and can’t go any further. I wish there were hints .  I stopped playing and wish I never purchased it.

reviews.review_title: Beautiful game, but it has its glitches
reviews.review_description: I love the game, it’s very thoughtful, however there are significant glitches, I have to play on the top of my bed to be able to play and have a good view of the game. Also, they should have a way to skip the taking since I have been trying to figure out to pass the scenes so many times. Many times I can’t see any instructions for the next step. Overall I am in love. I hope they fix it
